gist.headline: Daily News Update

gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee updating a digital bulletin board or writing in a diary. Since it's a routine docs update, a cozy library or study room setting fits well.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, pinning a new note to a wooden bulletin board. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm cream gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
